CONCLUSION: The provided patent indicators successfully reproduce the paper's NLP-based novelty and impact measures. The reuse aggregation correctly implements the additive formula |set| + Σui, avoiding the multiplicative bug noted in the documentation. Cosine similarity indicators are properly standardized. Computed descriptive statistics on the 500-patent sample align with the paper's award-patent benchmarks within expected sampling variation, validating the indicator definitions and preprocessing pipeline.
